calendar.matters:
Petition To Reform Trust To Conform To Trustor'S Intention
Off Calendar Mar-30-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nicholas Jellins for Elisabeth Oppenheimer (Petitioner).

Mr. Jellins stated there was no opposition and confirmed for the Court that his client also goes by the name Elisabeth Loeckx. The Court stated that all appeared to be in order and granted the petition (signing an order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
